arts.ttl: Preview: Preston North End vs. Burnley - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's FA Cup clash between Preston North End and Burnley, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Will Hannibal & Osmajic play in Preston-Burnley tie?
arts.sum: Burnley manager Scott Parker says he needs to "think hard" about picking Hannibal Mejbri for Saturday's FA Cup fifth-round tie at Preston.

arts.ttl: What Preston North End boss Paul Heckingbottom said about Hannibal and Milutin Osmajic ahead of Burnley FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Preston North End’s FA Cup tie against Burnley could have some extra “spice” to it, according to PNE boss Paul Heckingbottom.

arts.ttl: Burnley boss Parker: I'll protect Hannibal the best way I can
arts.sum: Burnley head coach Scott Parker says he will make "the decision I feel is right" as to whether to involve Hannibal Mejbri in Saturday's FA Cup fifth-round tie against Preston.

arts.ttl: EFL confirm Championship play-off dates as Leeds United set sights on title glory
arts.sum: Dates have been confirmed for this season's Championship play-offs as Leeds United look to avoid the end-of-season extravaganza. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Burnley weighing up Hannibal selection dilemma for Preston North End FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Scott Parker has admitted he’s having to weigh up whether to take Hannibal out of his Burnley side for this weekend’s FA Cup tie against Preston North End.

arts.ttl: Burnley injury state of play ahead of Preston North End FA Cup tie as Scott Parker confirms blow
arts.sum: Bashir Humphreys is facing a spell on the sidelines through injury, dealing a big blow to Burnley’s league and cup ambitions.
